headlines.title: Palace was handed Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago
headlines.description: Thousands of emails containing information about the former prince's financial dealings were given to the Royal Household in 2020.

headlines.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
headlines.description: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

headlines.title: Arrive three hours before flight home, airline boss tells UK holidaymakers
headlines.description: Wizz Air CEO Yvonne Moynihan also advises passengers to carry portable chargers and water due to lengthy queues.

headlines.title: Millions of breast cancer patients could safely avoid chemotherapy, study suggests
headlines.description: A new DNA test could help screen whether patients require the treatment or not, according to a new international trial.

headlines.title: Attorney general had 'no doubt' on reviewing teen boys' rape sentences
headlines.description: Lord Hermer tells the BBC he wanted "detail as quickly as possible" after hearing about the case in which the rapists were spared custody.

headlines.title: Ukraine using AI drones to strike vital convoys supplying Russian troops
headlines.description: BBC Verify has analysed videos of attacks in occupied Ukraine on Russian trucks carrying ammunition, fuel and food.

headlines.description: YouTuber Kane Parsons' eerie YouTube series has been adapted for a film called Backrooms.

headlines.title: Tickets for festivals are getting more expensive - we compared them
headlines.description: Reading and Leeds, Glastonbury, Parklife and Download have surged in price.

headlines.title: After decades risking arrest, South Korea's tattoo artists step into the limelight
headlines.description: Only licensed doctors were allowed to ink tattoos in Korea - breaking the law could lead to heavy fines or jail.

headlines.title: Move over, Heated Rivalry - there's a new ice hockey romance obsession
headlines.description: The Amazon Prime adaptation of Elle Kennedy's ice hockey romance book is an early hit with viewers.

headlines.title: Trump in excellent health after annual checkup, his doctor says
headlines.description: The White House releases the results of the US president's latest medical examination, which states he is "fully fit" to carry out his duties.

headlines.title: Ruben Dias says he 'draws line' over Maya Jama break-up speculation
headlines.description: The Man City footballer says he usually remains silent on rumours about his personal life, but feels forced to correct the public record.

headlines.title: Four more men freed from flooded Laos cave
headlines.description: The first of the five men was rescued on Friday after flash-flooding cut the men off from an exit

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Putin pushes Nato to brink' and 'groundbreaking' breast cancer test
headlines.description: Several of the papers have focused on the Russian drone that hit a block of flats in Romania on Friday.

headlines.title: Can Americans spell the National Spelling Bee’s winning words?
headlines.description: Shrey Parikh, a 14-year-old, won the competition this year after correctly spelling 32 words in a 90-second lighting round tiebreaker.

headlines.title: Spain's Sánchez digs in after eight years as PM as wave of scandals threatens survival
headlines.description: Corruption probes of colleagues and relatives have put Spain's premier into a fight for survival.

headlines.title: Mumbai's famed dabbawalas fed millions for over 100 years - now they are disappearing
headlines.description: Dabbawalas, who deliver home-cooked meals, are leaving the trade as remote work and rising costs threaten their future.

headlines.title: AI-powered version of Ozzy to appear in city

headlines.title: Lego cathedral model completed after 10-year build
headlines.description: The Very Reverend Joe Hawes says the project is "testament" to what the community can accomplish.

headlines.title: Officer who pulled driver from burning car honoured
headlines.description: PC Jay Wakefield has been nominated for the Police Federation's National Police Bravery award.

headlines.title: Basketball-playing robot built by sixth-formers wins tech competition
headlines.description: A basketball-playing robot won Friends' School in Lisburn first place at the UK-wide First Tech Challenge robotics competition.
